name: §6Wither Skeleton
description:
§8Mining Pet

§7Defense: §a25
§7Strength: §c25
§7Crit Chance: §95%
§7Crit Damage: §925%
§7Intelligence: §b25

§6Stronger Bones
§7Take §a30% §7less damage from §f🦴
§fSkeletal §7mobs.

§6Wither Blood
§7Deal §a100% §7more damage to §8☠ Wither
§7mobs.

§6Death's Touch
§7Upon hitting an enemy inflict the
§7wither effect for §a200% §7damage over 3
§7seconds
§8Does not stack

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Dark Wither Skeleton Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aWither Skeleton§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
